message:
feat(reactive): add binding macros and two-way bindings (bd-2my1.2)

Add ergonomic binding utilities for connecting Observable values to UI:
- Binding<T>: read-only binding with lazy evaluation on get()
- bind_observable(): direct binding to an Observable
- bind_mapped()/bind_mapped2(): transformed bindings from 1-2 sources
- Binding::then(): chain transforms on existing bindings
- TwoWayBinding<T>: bidirectional sync with cycle prevention
- bind!/bind_map!/bind_map2! macros for ergonomic syntax

17 unit tests covering one-way, two-way, macros, chains, drop cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
